original_prompt: Clean up useless Gantt components and fix utilization/location logic.
rephrased_goal: Refactor view.gantt.js to remove Sync Range, Duration, and Completion stats. Replace Location headings with Van Names and fix utilization math by fetching van associations.

tasks.description: Do-Pebble: Refactor view.gantt.js logic and template
subtasks_required: 1.1 Remove Sync Range checkbox and related filtering logic
1.2 Remove Duration (stat-hours) and Completion (stat-count) badges from toolbar
1.3 Update fetchGanttData to include Vans collection
1.4 Create tech-to-van map using tech_id in van metadata
1.5 Change grouping from base_location_name to Van Name
tasks.analogy_reference: Remove old weeds, plant better seeds
tasks.testing_criteria: Stats gone, Van names visible, math looks correct.

tasks.description: Check-Pebble: Verify build and data sync
subtasks_required: 2.2 Check console for van mapping completeness
tasks.analogy_reference: Poke soil to see if firm

subtasks_required: 3.1 Verify grouping behaves when tech has no van
3.2 Confirm Gantt blocks still render correctly
